title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ISRO Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ISRO Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ISRO Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ISRO Advisory Limited:
ISRO Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO Advisory Limited!
